titleStmt.title: SII 18.335: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 335. (B.K. No. 29 of 1934-35.) IṬGI, RANEBENNUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Piece of broken slab near the Virūpakshaliṅga temple.

summary.p: This fragmentary inscription is dated in Śaka 991, Saumya, Chaitra Amāvāsya, Thursday, Saṁkramaṇa. The details are irregular. The tithi cited corresponds to A.D. 1069, March 25, Wednesday. The saṁkramaṇa occurred on Tuesday the 24th March.

It states that a Mahāsāmanta (name lost) who was in charge of the Manneya of Raṭṭapaḷḷi Seventy and Iṭṭage Thirty, which together constituted the Nūṟuṁbāḍa, made a grant of land for the worship and offerings to god Virūpākshadēva of Iṭṭage.
The record was written by Sandhivigrahi Masaṇayya and was engraved by Saṁkōja.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
vīra
sthāpa
purava
ḍa śrī ma
śrīmanmahāsāma raṭṭapaḷḷi
Eḻpattuma Iṭṭage mūvattuma Aṁtu nūṟuṁcāḍama
sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ manneyatanaṁgeyuttaṁ sakavarṣa 991 ne
ya saumyasaṁvatsarada caitradamavāśye brihaspativāra saṁ
kramaṇadaṁdu tammasivaṭaṁ Iṭṭageyalu virūpākṣa
dēvargge snāna nivēdyakke dēguladiṁ teṁka viriyiṁ mūḍa
beḻdale mattarondu kannaragaṭṭada keḷage gaḻde kamma Aydu
Intīdharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidargge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētra
dalu sāsirvvabrāhmaṇargge sāsira kavileyanubhayamukhi
goṭṭaphalimakku . Idanaḷidavar sāsirvva brā(ṁ)hmaṇarumaṁ
sāsira kavileyanaḷida mahāpātakanakku . baredaṁ sandhi
vigrahi masaṇayyaṁ . khaṇḍarisidaṁ saṁkōja © ©
Digital edition of SII 18.335 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
